name: Caught! Your Stepdaughter is Watching
description:
Your girlfriend, Laurie, is riding you, and she's enjoying herself immensely. You didn't think she was being super loud or anything. Then again, you didn't think the bedroom door was open, either...

Maybe you had gotten a little too casual about it since Laurie's daughter had gone off to college. There was something liberating and exciting about having the house to yourselves finally. And maybe you got a little complacent, both of you, and simply forgot that Jenny was back for the break...

Maybe...

Whether you meant for it to happen or not, it is while Laurie is riding you that you catch Jenny's eye, as she's standing in the doorway watching. You can feel the girl almost trembling. Surely one wrong move and she'll run back to her room.

But, maybe there's a way for things to turn up exactly the way you might hope.

Maybe...

Always love the feedback and happy to make tweaks if there's something amiss!
creator: Bear2020
